name: turbopuffer-mcp-server
title: turbopuffer
summary: Connect to turbopuffer for serverless vector and full-text search over your data.
description: The turbopuffer MCP server connects AI agents to turbopuffer, a serverless search engine built on object storage. Query namespaces using vector similarity search, BM25 full-text search, hybrid search, and attribute filtering. Upsert, delete, and manage documents across namespaces. Fast, 10x cheaper, and extremely scalable.

useCases.name: Search Infrastructure
useCases.description: Power semantic search, BM25 full-text search, and hybrid search over billions of documents with sub-10ms cached latency, backed by object storage for cost-efficient scaling.

useCases.name: RAG Pipelines
useCases.description: Build retrieval-augmented generation pipelines by connecting AI agents to turbopuffer for fast, scalable context retrieval over large document collections.

useCases.name: Retrieval
useCases.description: Efficiently narrow millions of documents down to tens or hundreds for downstream processing, reranking, or generation using vector similarity and attribute filtering.

turbopufferApiKey.description: Authenticate with your turbopuffer API key.
turbopufferApiKey.name: Authorization
